summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Bharat Climate Twin. All 21 backend endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Tested health check, multi-role authentication (policymaker/scientist/farmer), climate data endpoints (states, cities, snapshot, historical), monsoon monitoring (status, timeseries), extreme weather alerts, drought index (SPI), scenario simulation with LLM narratives, all 4 sector dashboards (agriculture, water, urban, energy), and AI advisor chat. All data sources online (NASA POWER, Open-Meteo, ERA5, IMD-style). LLM integration working correctly with Claude Sonnet-4 generating narratives for scenarios, sectors, and advisor responses.
passed_tests: Health Check - All 4 data sources online (NASA POWER, Open-Meteo, ERA5, IMD-style)
Auth Register - Policymaker, Scientist, Farmer roles working
Auth Login - Seed users (policymaker@test.in, scientist@test.in, farmer@test.in) login successful with JWT
Auth Me - GET /api/auth/me returns authenticated user with role
Climate States - Returns 36 Indian states/UTs with lat/lon/zone
Climate Snapshot - Returns current weather + 30d climatology + provenance for lat/lon
Climate State Snapshot - Returns Delhi (DL) snapshot with state info
Climate Historical - Returns 181 days of ERA5 time series data
Monsoon Status - Returns phase (onset), national departure (-92.9%), 14 state summaries
Monsoon Timeseries - Returns 181 days of daily/cumulative/climatology rainfall arrays
Extremes Alerts - Monitors 20 states, returns alerts with severity levels
Drought Index - Returns SPI categorization for all 36 states (12 at risk)
Scenario Simulation - Returns projection + chart + LLM narrative for MH +2°C @ 20y
Sector Agriculture - Returns 5 indicators + AI narrative for Gujarat
Sector Water - Returns 5 indicators + AI narrative for Maharashtra
Sector Urban - Returns 5 indicators + AI narrative for Delhi
Sector Energy - Returns 5 indicators + AI narrative for Rajasthan
AI Advisor Chat - Returns session_id + contextual reply (2484 chars) + used_context for Kerala monsoon query
